_comment: Edit this file before running scripts/init.sh to customize the template for your project.

project.name: my-app
project.description: A production-grade TypeScript React fullstack application
project.author: Your Name

ports._comment: Default dev server ports. Auto-increments if occupied.

features._comment: Set to false to remove a feature from the project during init

database._comment: Set enabled=true to include DB env vars in .env.local
